project_data: Project: Cloud Migration Phase 2. Sprint 14 completed. 3 of 5 workloads migrated. IAM integration delayed by 1 week due to dependency on identity provider configuration. Performance testing for workload 3 passed. Budget utilization at 62% of annual allocation. Team capacity reduced by 1 FTE (parental leave). Next sprint: begin workload 4 migration and resolve IAM blocker.
